calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-16-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-27-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up (subrogation) Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long.
Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Progressive West Insurance Company, as subrogee of Fanny Fang.
After hearing the evidence presented and declaration in file, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Shontavia Leatrice Gunn as follows:
Damages $34,496.14
Prejudgment Interest $6,477.00
No Attorney's Fees.
Costs $402.50 for a total of $41,375.64
Judgment signed in open court.
